trades.reasoning: Top screener score (100) with every signal firing — MACD crossover, rising histogram, RSI at 69.8 in the ideal bullish zone, price well above SMA-20, and a volume surge confirming institutional interest.
Quality large-cap AI/semiconductor leader with clean MACD crossover, RSI 65.1 comfortably in the bullish zone, and price above SMA-20 — best risk-adjusted momentum pick in the high-score tier.
Score-90 optical interconnect play with RSI 61.9 in the mid-bullish zone and MACD crossover; avoids the overbought crowding in the 80+ RSI names while still showing clear upward momentum.

decisions.briefing: Markets were calm and slightly positive today — NASDAQ +0.4%, S&P500 +0.3% — a neutral tape with no major shock to risk appetite. With 4 open slots and $1,200 in cash sitting idle, I deployed into the screener's top setups: HCC (perfect score, all signals green including volume surge), NVDA (high-quality large-cap momentum), and AAOI (mid-RSI bullish zone, avoiding the overbought cluster). One slot remains open as a buffer for upcoming opportunities or volatility.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities edged higher on Monday in a quiet, low-volatility session, with the S&P 500 up 0.3% and NASDAQ gaining 0.4% as investors engaged in selective buying across technology and growth sectors without a single dominant catalyst. Positive market breadth signaled underlying demand for equities, even as uncertainty around Federal Reserve rate trajectory and lingering trade policy questions kept major indices from breaking out to new highs. The muted but constructive tone suggests participants are cautiously optimistic heading into the summer, waiting for clearer macro signals before committing to larger positions.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市週一在平靜的低波動環境下小幅走高，標普500上漲0.3%，納斯達克上漲0.4%，成長股與科技股受到選擇性買盤支撐，但缺乏單一明確的催化劑。市場廣度偏正面，反映投資者對股市仍保有基本需求，但聯準會利率走向的不確定性及貿易政策議題持續壓抑指數突破高點的動能。整體氣氛審慎樂觀，市場參與者傾向靜待更清晰的宏觀訊號，再決定是否加大部位規模。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing means buying stocks that are already rising and showing strong technical confirmation — like an RSI between 55–70 (healthy uptrend, not yet overbought), a MACD crossover, and a price above key moving averages. The logic is that trends in motion tend to persist, and entering while momentum is building — not after it has peaked — improves the odds. Today's top picks (HCC, NVDA, AAOI) were chosen precisely because their RSIs are in the bullish-but-not-overbought sweet spot, avoiding the risk of buying exhausted moves.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資策略專注於選取已處於上升趨勢且技術指標持續強勁的股票——例如RSI位於55至70的健康區間（尚未超買）、MACD出現黃金交叉，以及股價站穩於關鍵移動平均線之上。其核心邏輯是：已形成的趨勢傾向於延續，在動能剛建立時進場（而非頂部追高）能顯著提升勝率。今日首選的HCC、NVDA及AAOI，均因RSI落在55至70的甜蜜區間而入選，刻意迴避RSI已超過80的過熱標的，以控制追高風險。
